name: Completed TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry has no posted registry table
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov still lacks a posted results table for NCT02531334, but PMID 29546832 is matched to the trial and carries outcome results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT02531334 as completed with no posted registry results in the June 15, 2026 API view; the matched publication PMID 29546832 identifies the same ClinicalTrials.gov protocol, so the registry entry should be treated as no-posted-registry-table context rather than absence of publication results.
population_or_model: Adults aged 32 to 70 years with metabolic syndrome
time_horizon: Actual study completion listed in June 2018; publication indexed in 2018; no posted registry table as of June 15, 2026.
quantitative_note: Registry estimated enrollment was 40; full text identifies protocol H14-278/NCT02531334; publication reports 40 recruited and 37 completed the whole intervention.
caveats: No posted registry table still limits registry-level transparency.
The outcome evidence belongs to PMID 29546832, not the ClinicalTrials.gov results module.
The metabolic-syndrome scope is disease-context biomarker evidence, not broad aging evidence.
